_comment: ComfyUI /prompt API workflow: load a batch of same-size PNGs -> ESRGAN upscale -> save the batch back out under each slot's original filename. Requires the SWGLoadImageBatch/SWGSaveImageBatch custom nodes (custom_nodes/swg_batch_io.py). Placeholders {INPUT_FILENAMES}, {OUTPUT_FILENAMES}, {OUTPUT_SUBFOLDER}, and {MODEL_NAME} are substituted by hd_rerender.py before submission. {INPUT_FILENAMES}/{OUTPUT_FILENAMES} are newline-separated lists, one entry per batch slot, in matching order.
